title: No culpes al karma de lo que te pasa por gilipollas
original_title: No culpes al karma de lo que te pasa por gilipollas
overview: The lives of a Madrid-based feather-fashion designer and her whole family's completely tumbles after the appearance of a musician long-lost high school crush who is involved with her model sister.
